title: Lu Yanfei
content:
Lu Yanfei
 is the Grand Elder of the 
Origin Sect
.

Appearance
[
]

She has a great like for anything associated with the color "red" as she wears red clothes and her residence is also made of deep red stones.

Background
[
]

The young master of 
Purple Dao Sect
, 
Rudy
, attempted to strong-arm her into a becoming his cultivation partner in the past. However, his true intentions were to use her as a cultivation furnace.

He went as far as storming the Origin Sect to kidnap her but he and his attendant, 
Song Wude
, were kicked out by the previous Ancestor of the Origin Sect.

History
[
]

Rudy and Song Wude attacked the Origin Sect after hearing the news of its Old Ancestor passing away only to end up offending 
Wang Lin
 and dying a meaningless death.
